name: Chicken Dinola (Chicken Soup with Ginger & Ve
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Chicken, cut into serving pieces
1 bn Fresh Spinach, cut into 3-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the papaya skin. Cut the papaya lengthwise into 4-6 pieces, remove seeds and slice diagonally about 1/2 inch thick. Set aside.
2. In a deep soup pot over medium heat, sauté garlic in oil until lightly browned.
3. Add ginger and onion, stir for a minute.
4. Add chicken pieces and fish sauce. Cook for 3 minutes.
5. Add water. Season with a little salt and pepper.
6. Let boil, then simmer covered over medium low heat for 25 - 30 minutes.
7. Add raw papaya and continue cooking for 6 to 8 minutes or until tender.
8. Adjust seasonings to taste.
9. Turn off the heat.
10. Add spinach, cover for 1-2 minutes.
11. Serve immediately. Serves 4-5. Note: If green papaya is not available, substitute with potatoes.
